name: SplitButton

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Label for the primary action button. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom content for the primary action button, replacing Text.

parameters.name: MenuContent
parameters.description: The dropdown's menu items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent opened by the chevron half.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Fires when the primary action button (the left half) is clicked.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Button color/style variant, applied to both halves. Defaults to Default.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Button size, applied to both halves and used to compute the chevron half's fixed width. Defaults to Default.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, disables both halves — the primary action and the dropdown trigger.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root wrapper.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Fires when the primary action button (the left half) is clicked.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<SplitButton Text="Save" OnClick="HandleSave">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="HandleSaveAndPublish">Save and Publish</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="HandleSaveAsDraft">Save as Draft</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem>Discard changes</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>

@code {
    private void HandleSave() { /* primary action */ }
    private void HandleSaveAndPublish() { /* secondary */ }
    private void HandleSaveAsDraft() { /* secondary */ }
}

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<SplitButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Secondary" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Outline" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<SplitButton Text="Small" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
    <MenuContent><DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem></MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent><DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem></MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Large" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Lg">
    <MenuContent><DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem></MenuContent>
</SplitButton>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Custom content for the primary action button, replacing Text.

slots.name: MenuContent
slots.description: The dropdown's menu items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent opened by the chevron half.

mdSummary:
# SplitButton

Split Button component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/split-button

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SplitButton | Text | `string?` | `` | Label for the primary action button. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied. |
| SplitButton | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom content for the primary action button, replacing Text. |
| SplitButton | MenuContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The dropdown's menu items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent opened by the chevron half. |
| SplitButton | OnClick | `EventCallback\<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs\>` | `` | Fires when the primary action button (the left half) is clicked. |
| SplitButton | Variant | `Button.ButtonVariant` | `Button.ButtonVariant.Default` | Button color/style variant, applied to both halves. Defaults to Default. |
| SplitButton | Size | `Button.ButtonSize` | `Button.ButtonSize.Default` | Button size, applied to both halves and used to compute the chevron half's fixed width. Defaults to Default. |
| SplitButton | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | When true, disables both halves — the primary action and the dropdown trigger. |
| SplitButton | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper. |
| SplitButton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root wrapper. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (SplitButton) — Custom content for the primary action button, replacing Text.
- `MenuContent` (SplitButton) — The dropdown's menu items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent opened by the chevron half.

## Events
- `OnClick` (`EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>`) — Fires when the primary action button (the left half) is clicked.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<SplitButton />
```

## CSS variables
`--radius`

## Files
- `UI/SplitButton/SplitButton.razor`
